allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['name','description','language','topics','html_url','homepage','stargazers_count','forks_count'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(d, list\): for i in d[:10]: print\(i\) elif isinstance\(d, dict\): for k,v in list\(d.items\(\)\)[:5]: print\(k,':', str\(v\)[:100]\) except Exception as e: print\('err:', e\) print\(sys.stdin.read\(\)[:500]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['name','description','language','topics','html_url','homepage'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
